code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  match tok
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(nums, n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

# insertion sort
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut j = 0
while j < list.len(nums)
  let cur = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  mut inserted: List<Int> = []
  mut placed = false
  mut k = 0
  while k < list.len(sorted)
    let s = match list.get(sorted, k)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    if not placed and cur < s
      inserted = list.push(inserted, cur)
      placed = true
    end
    inserted = list.push(inserted, s)
    k = k + 1
  end
  if not placed
    inserted = list.push(inserted, cur)
  end
  sorted = inserted
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut m = 0
while m < list.len(sorted)
  let v = match list.get(sorted, m)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  if m == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  m = m + 1
end
println(out)
